data.description:
## What
The new flags (REBAR_GATE_REF/SOURCE/TMPDIR/FREE_WATERMARK_BYTES/GRACE_SECONDS/MAX_AGE_SECONDS/REVERIFY_SECONDS/JANITOR_INTERVAL_SECONDS), the [snapshot] config table, the --ref/--source CLI flags, and REBAR_LLM_REPO_PATH's new precedence vs the gate code root are documented only in docs/repo-snapshot-gates.md, NOT in docs/config.md (the canonical config-key inventory). src/rebar/config.md path: docs/config.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] docs/config.md documents the [snapshot] section + all eight REBAR_GATE_* env vars with defaults + precedence.
- [ ] docs/config.md notes the gate code-root precedence in repo_path resolution.
- [ ] The doc-coverage test (or a new one) asserts these keys appear in docs/config.md so they cannot silently drift.
data.title: Document the [snapshot] config section + REBAR_GATE_* flags in docs/config.md
